diagnosis: Seal wear detected — minor seal deterioration flagged during routine inspection.
recommended_action: Schedule seal replacement within 2 weeks. Monitor pressure differential daily.

supporting_evidence.description: W_SEAL_INTEGRITY warning — pressure differential outside spec
All other sensor readings within normal range

diagnosis: Hydraulic seal failure in progress — critical pressure loss with declining flow rate.
recommended_action: Shut down pump. Replace rear seal assembly immediately. Do not operate until repairs complete.

supporting_evidence.description: Outlet pressure at 2.8 bar — below critical threshold of 2.0 bar and falling
Flow rate at 16.8 L/min — 44% below nominal
E_PRESSURE_LOW triggered after restart attempt failed to restore pressure
Oil contamination near rear seal assembly observed in logs

recommended_action: Check for leaks in the pneumatic/hydraulic circuit. Inspect seals, hoses, and fittings. Verify pump operation.
